race.comment: LIVE TO RISE (4) progressive mare building a good winning CV. Covered ground from the wide gate and kept finding through the line with a solid second over 1000m at Gunnedah. Unbeaten second-up and gets the right run. DETAIN (1) good fresh mare who demolished a strong field first-up in the heavy going over 1000m at Scone. Undefeated second-up and sure to be in the finish. NIRMATA (3) in a real purple patch at present and can keep the winning momentum going from the inside gate. Rounded them up with ease from the wide draw with a comfortable victory over 1000m at Tamworth in the John Clift. Leading contender. BOLD DESIGN (5) first-up with a solid fresh record. Primed with the two trials and proven at this track and trip from the good gate. Each way.
